scripts.build:pwa: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=/pod/ vite build
scripts.build:android: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=./ vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:ios: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=./ vite build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:apk: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=./ vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:apk:debug: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=./ vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.ios:archive: npm run vendor:civic-ai && VITE_BASE=./ vite build && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/App.xcarchive archive
